Title: Verify User Registration with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Call CreateWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is not an error
3. Verify that user data is stored in the database
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and data is stored in the database.

Title: Verify User Registration with Invalid Email
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Call CreateWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is an error
Expected Result: Registration fails due to invalid email.

Title: Verify User Registration with Invalid Password
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Call CreateWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is an error
Expected Result: Registration fails due to invalid password length.

Title: Verify User Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps:
1. Call signInWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is not an error
3. Verify that user is logged in
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.

Title: Verify User Login with Invalid Email
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps:
1. Call signInWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is an error
Expected Result: Login fails due to invalid email.

Title: Verify User Login with Invalid Password
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps:
1. Call signInWithEmailAndPassword(email, password)
2. Check if Response is an error
Expected Result: Login fails due to incorrect password.

Title: Verify Mission Completion by User
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a mission
Test Steps:
1. Call SetSuperato(Mission ID, New Status)
2. Check if Mission is marked as completed
Expected Result: Mission is marked as completed.

Title: Verify Attempt to Complete Non-Existent Mission
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Call SetSuperato(Mission ID, New Status)
2. Check if Mission is not marked as completed
Expected Result: Mission is not marked as completed due to non-existent ID.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a mission
Test Steps:
1. Update mission status in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that the mission status is updated in the application
Expected Result: Mission status is updated in the application.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with No Changes
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a mission
Test Steps:
1. Do not update mission status in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that the mission status remains unchanged in the application
Expected Result: Mission status remains unchanged in the application.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with Invalid Token
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a mission
Test Steps:
1. Simulate an invalid token in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that the mission status is not updated in the application
Expected Result: Mission status is not updated in the application due to invalid token.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with Network Error
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a mission
Test Steps:
1. Simulate network error in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that the mission status is not updated in the application
Expected Result: Mission status is not updated in the application due to network error.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with Multiple Missions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple missions
Test Steps:
1. Update mission statuses in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that all mission statuses are updated in the application
Expected Result: All mission statuses are updated in the application.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with No Missions
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Do not update any mission statuses in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that no mission statuses are updated in the application
Expected Result: No mission statuses are updated in the application.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with Partial Missions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple missions
Test Data:
- Mission IDs: [1, 2, 3]
- New Status: [true, false, true]
Test Steps:
1. Update some mission statuses in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that only updated mission statuses are reflected in the application
Expected Result: Only updated mission statuses are reflected in the application.

Title: Verify Real-Time Data Change Handling with Duplicate Missions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple missions
Test Data:

- New Status: [true, true, true]
Test Steps:
1. Update mission statuses in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that duplicate mission statuses are handled correctly in the application
Expected Result: Duplicate mission statuses are handled correctly in the application.

Preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple missions
Test Steps:
1. Update mission statuses in the database
2. Wait for onDataChange() to trigger
3. Verify that the missing mission is ignored in the application
Expected Result: The missing mission is ignored in the application.

Preconditions: User is logged in and has multiple missions
Test Steps:
